scene.message: Mark: Hey! Don't you dare{nl} diss my art!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: ...Unbelievable.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Quiet!{nl} Someone's there...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: There's something!{nl} Who is it?! Come out!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Ayase?{nl} What are you doing here?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Ayase...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Okay, okay, Yuka!{nl} Everyone agree?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Tch, fine.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...Poor Yuka.{waitkey}{ret}
Take her along?{nl} {ctl0e:7}{ret}
Found the Security{nl} Card machine!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: {ctl0f:1},{nl} find something?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Oh! Hey!{nl} That's where it was!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What is it?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Who cares,{nl} let me try.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Whooooaaa?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: I said wait!{waitkey}{ret}
